commit.subject: LU-5365 tests: add check_poolname test program
commit.message:
LU-5365 tests: add check_poolname test program

This patch adds check_poolname test program to set stripe data
with pool name on two files: one using ioctl() and the other
using fsetxattr(), and check whether the pool name is saved on
both files.

Signed-off-by: Ned Bass <bass6@llnl.gov>
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic1bc6cec680db36f076c70e56f124fe1d9cbed4a
